title: Ethiopian-Style Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Ethiopia, made with tender lentils, sweet onions, and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Misir wot spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Ethiopian markets or online

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add ginger and garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the red lentils, Misir wot spice blend, and water to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
